nodes.name: LC
nodes.summary: LC表示 IUCN 无危等级，当前关联8208种鸟类，如鸵鸟、鸸鹋、南方鶴鴕等8208种鸟类。

nodes.name: Malachite sunbird
nodes.summary: Malachite sunbird（Malachite sunbird，学名 Nectarinia famosa），在图谱中标记为无危（LC）物种，主要分布于凡波斯。

nodes.name: 凡波斯
nodes.summary: 凡波斯是图谱中的地点节点，当前关联15种鸟类，包括Karoo korhaan、Striped flufftail、Fynbos buttonquail等15种鸟类，主要用于表示这些物种的分布地、停歇地或观测地。

links.label: 分布于
links.evidence: thumb|right|Male in South Africa thumb|right|Female feeding thumb|right|A breeding-plumage male feeding on Leonotis flower nectar. This large sunbird is found in hilly fynbos (including Protea stands as well as areas with aloes) and cool montane and coastal scrub, up to 2,800m altitude in South Africa
